notes: Pulled by scripts/pull_eoir_manuals.py. The EOIR practice manuals (ICPM + BIA Practice Manual) are JS-rendered and Akamai-gated, so they ship as pointer stubs with canonical URLs + chapter enumeration; the binding rules are 8 CFR Part 1003/1240/1208 in ../immigration-regulations/. The _file_is_stub guard preserves any verbatim content a future headless/un-gated run commits.
